name_romaji: Tachi, mei Bizen no Kuni Osafune-jū Nagamitsu saku
name_en: Tachi Sword, Signed "Made by Nagamitsu of Osafune in Bizen Province"
description_en: This tachi is a long sword bearing the signature "made by Nagamitsu of Osafune in Bizen Province," a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1961-03-24.

name_romaji: Tachi, mei Yamato no Kuni Taema Tomo (irei kire) den Tomokiyo
name_en: Tachi Sword, Signed "Yamato Province Taema Tomo..." (remainder cut), Attributed to Tomokiyo
description_en: This tachi is a long sword bearing the partial signature "Yamato Province Taema Tomo..." with the remainder cut off, attributed to Tomokiyo, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1961-03-24.

name_en: Seated Statue of the Eleven-headed Kannon
description_en: This seated statue of the eleven-headed Kannon (Jūichimen Kannon Bosatsu) is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1985-12-16. It is located in Kuno-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Main Hall and Niō Gate of Kannonji Temple
description_en: The Main Hall and Niō Gate of Kannonji Temple are structures classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1991-01-25. It is located in Kuno-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Five-ring Stupa at the Tōrinji Castle Ruins
description_en: This gorintō is a five-ring stone stupa located at the Tōrinji castle ruins, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1974-05-01. It is located in Shinchi-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Five-ring Stupa of Tokugetsuin
description_en: This gorintō is a five-ring stone stupa at Tokugetsuin, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1983-05-06. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Japanese Nutmeg Tree (Kaya)
description_en: This kaya is a Japanese nutmeg tree, a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1983-05-06. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Site of the Main Gate of Ushiku Castle
description_en: This is the site of the main gate (ōtemon) of Ushiku Castle, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1983-05-06. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Onabake Road Guidepost
description_en: This is a stone guidepost on the Onabake road, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1983-05-06. It is located in Sakuradai 1-chōme, Ushiku City.

name_en: Dainichi Mound and Stone Statue of Dainichi Nyorai
description_en: This is a Dainichi mound with a stone statue of Dainichi Nyorai, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1983-05-06. It is located in Kamiōta-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Dainichi Mound and Stone Statue of Dainichi Nyorai
description_en: This is a Dainichi mound with a stone statue of Dainichi Nyorai, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1983-05-06. It is located in Shimada-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Dainichi Mound and Stone Statue of Dainichi Nyorai
description_en: This is a Dainichi mound with a stone statue of Dainichi Nyorai, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1983-05-06. It is located in Katsura-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Nakane Milestone Mound (Ichirizuka)
description_en: The Nakane ichirizuka is a milestone mound marking a historic road, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1987-04-01. It is located in Hitachino-nishi 3-chōme, Ushiku City.

name_en: Treasure Pagoda of Yakushiji Temple
description_en: This hōtō is a treasure pagoda at Yakushiji Temple, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1987-04-01. It is located in Tamiya-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Seated Wooden Statue of Yakushi Nyorai
description_en: This seated wooden statue of Yakushi Nyorai is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 1999-06-23. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Narui Milestone Mound (Ichirizuka)
description_en: The Narui ichirizuka is a milestone mound marking a historic road, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2001-06-22. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Kosaka Castle Ruins
description_en: The Kosaka Castle Ruins are a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2006-11-24. It is located in Kosaka-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Tomb Monument of the Haiku Poet Sekiryū
description_en: This is the tomb monument (bohi) of the haiku poet Sekiryū, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2008-09-26. It is located in Ushiku-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Stone Statue of Dainichi Nyorai of the Diamond Realm (Ji-nenbutsu Pagoda)
description_en: This is a stone statue of Dainichi Nyorai of the Diamond Realm, also known as the Ji-nenbutsu pagoda, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2008-09-26. It is located in Tamiya-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Amida Nyorai Triad
description_en: This is a triad of Amida Nyorai and attendants, a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2008-09-26. It is located in Inooka-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Seated Statues of Enma Daiō and Datsueba
description_en: These are seated statues of Enma Daiō and Datsueba, a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2008-09-26. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Jewel-shaped Inkstone Excavated at the Ubagami Site
description_en: This is a jewel-shaped inkstone (hōju suzuri) excavated at the Ubagami site, an archaeological material classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2010-06-28.

name_en: Ungyotei
description_en: Ungyotei is a historic building, a structure classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2010-06-28. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Statue of Shōmen Kongō
description_en: This is a statue of Shōmen Kongō, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2010-06-28. It is located in Higashimamiana-machi, Ushiku City.

name_romaji: Yatsunoue iseki shutsudo Ōbora A-shiki ki dogū oyobi doki gun
name_en: Ōbora A-type Clay Figurine and Pottery Group Excavated at the Yatsunoue Site
description_en: This is a group of Ōbora A-type clay figurines and pottery excavated at the Yatsunoue site, an archaeological material classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2011-10-17.

name_romaji: Amida raigō oyobi Senju Kannon zu
name_en: Painting of the Descent of Amida and the Thousand-armed Kannon
description_en: This is a painting depicting the descent (raigō) of Amida and the thousand-armed Kannon, a painting classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2011-10-17. It is located in Kuno-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Avenue of Trees Along the Approach to Tamiyasan Yakushiji Temple
description_en: This is the avenue of trees lining the approach path to Tamiyasan Yakushiji Temple, a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2011-10-17. It is located in Tamiya-machi, Ushiku City.

name_romaji: Shihon tansai Rōyō to sōson, Ogawa Usen hitsu
name_en: "Old Willow and Desolate Village," Light-colored Painting on Paper by Ogawa Usen
description_en: This is a light-colored painting on paper titled "Old Willow and Desolate Village" by Ogawa Usen, a painting classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2012-05-21.

name_romaji: Shihon tansai Denka shiki sōga, Ogawa Usen hitsu
name_en: "Grasses of the Four Seasons at a Farmhouse," Light-colored Painting on Paper by Ogawa Usen
description_en: This is a light-colored painting on paper depicting grasses of the four seasons at a farmhouse by Ogawa Usen, a painting classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2012-05-21.

name_en: Monument to the Kappa
description_en: This is a stone monument dedicated to the kappa, a craft object classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2013-04-22. It is located in Jōchū-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Handscroll Depicting the Daimyō Procession of the Ushiku Domain
description_en: This is a handscroll depicting the daimyō procession of the Ushiku domain, a historical material classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2018-03-26.

name_en: Illustration of Military Battle Formations
description_en: This is an illustration of military battle formations, a historical material classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2025-12-18.

name_en: Portrait of Yamaguchi Shigemasa
description_en: This is a portrait of Yamaguchi Shigemasa, a painting classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2025-12-18.

name_romaji: Kyū Okada Shōgakkō Onabake bunkō kōsha
name_en: Former Schoolhouse of the Onabake Branch of Okada Elementary School
description_en: This is the former schoolhouse of the Onabake branch of Okada Elementary School, a structure classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Ushiku City and was designated on 2018-05-10. It is located in Onabake-machi, Ushiku City.

name_en: Materials Related to Mamiya Rinzō
description_en: These are materials related to Mamiya Rinzō, historical materials classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 1992-03-03. It is located in Kamihirayanagi, Tsukubamirai City.

name_en: Seated Statue of Yakushi Nyorai
description_en: This seated statue of Yakushi Nyorai is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 1995-06-01. It is located in the Fukuokadai common land, Tsukubamirai City.

name_en: Statue of the Thousand-armed Kannon
description_en: This is a statue of the thousand-armed Kannon (Senju Kannon), a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 2000-03-31. It is located in Higashikuriyama, Tsukubamirai City.

name_en: Standing Statue of Amida Nyorai
description_en: This standing statue of Amida Nyorai is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 2000-03-31. It is located in Buttai, Tsukubamirai City.

name_en: Standing Wooden Statue of the Eleven-headed Kannon
description_en: This standing wooden statue of the eleven-headed Kannon is a sculpture classified as a tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 2001-03-27. It is located in the Fukuokadai common land, Tsukubamirai City.

name_en: Tekka Mound (with Attached Tekka Rod)
description_en: This is the Tekka mound, together with an attached tekka rod, a historic site (shiseki) among Japan's designated monuments. It is municipally designated by Tsukubamirai City and was designated on 2001-03-27. It is located in Miyado, Tsukubamirai City.
